payload.answer: The admin SQL DELETE command was rejected. Normal users do not have permission to execute administrative SQL operations on the memory system. No memory cards were deleted or altered.

entity_resolution.reason: No valid memory cards were targeted or modified; the command was rejected due to insufficient privileges and safety constraints.

details: Command intercepted and denied by role-based access control
Audit log entry created for unauthorized admin attempt

repair_options: Request admin privileges from system administrator
Use user-scoped memory management commands (e.g., /brain delete <id>)
Contact support for authorized data retention or deletion procedures
